strengths: Deep TypeScript and Node.js proficiency demonstrated across multiple senior production roles, directly matching the core stack requirement
Proven clean-architecture and TDD discipline (TDD, trunk-based development, CI/CD) signals strong engineering habits valued for long-term codebase health
Bonus-criteria coverage is exceptional: LLM/MCP integration, AWS CDK, and Kubernetes all checked from real project work
concerns: Candidate is a Staff/Senior engineer with 15+ years of experience; the role is explicitly entry-to-mid level, creating a strong overqualification mismatch that raises retention risk
Current location is Lagos, Nigeria, while the role demands high on-site presence — relocation intent and timeline are unknown
Relational database exposure skews heavily toward MongoDB and DLang-specific stores; PostgreSQL (the preferred DB) is not mentioned anywhere in the resume
response.justification: Bogdan Szabo is technically well-aligned with the stack — TypeScript, REST APIs, React, AWS, Kubernetes, and even LLM tooling are all present — but the role is a poor structural fit: he is a Staff-level engineer with roughly 15 years of experience being evaluated for a junior-to-mid position, which poses a real risk of disengagement and rapid attrition. The geographical situation (Lagos vs. high on-site presence in Berlin) adds a practical blocker that would need to be resolved upfront. If the team has a senior or lead vacancy, or is open to remote/relocation, this profile warrants a closer look; as stated, the seniority gap makes the match fragile.
